params.name: query
params.description: Query used to filter returned rows, specified as `<column_id_or_name>:<value>`. If you'd like to use a column name instead of an ID, you must quote it (e.g., `"My Column":123`). Also note that `value` is a JSON value; if you'd like to use a string, you must surround it in quotes (e.g., `"groceries"`).

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Specifies the sort order of the rows returned. If left unspecified, rows are returned by creation time ascending. "UpdatedAt" sort ordering is the order of rows based upon when they were last updated. This does not include updates to calculated values. "Natural" sort ordering is the order that the rows appear in the table view in the application. This ordering is only meaningfully defined for rows that are visible (unfiltered). Because of this, using this sort order will imply visibleOnly=true, that is, to only return visible rows. If you pass sortBy=natural and visibleOnly=false explicitly, this will result in a Bad Request error as this condition cannot be satisfied.

params.name: useColumnNames
params.description: Use column names instead of column IDs in the returned output. This is generally discouraged as it is fragile. If columns are renamed, code using original names may throw errors.

params.name: valueFormat
params.description: The format that cell values are returned as.

params.name: visibleOnly
params.description: If true, returns only visible rows and columns for the table.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in this query.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: An opaque token used to fetch the next page of results.

params.name: syncToken
params.description: An opaque token returned from a previous call that can be used to return results that are relevant to the query since the call where the syncToken was generated.

items.docs:
Returns a list of rows in a table.
### Value results
The `valueFormat` parameter dictates in what format the API should return values for individual cells.
* `simple` (default): Returns cell values as the following JSON values: `string`, `number`, or `boolean`. Array values (like multiselects) are returned as comma-delimited strings.
* `simpleWithArrays`: Singleton values are returned as `simple`. Array values are returned as JSON arrays and the values within are `simple` values (including neste

params.name: disableParsing
params.description: If true, the API will not attempt to parse the data in any way.

items.docs:
Inserts rows into a table, optionally updating existing rows if any upsert key columns are provided. This endpoint will always return a 202, so long as the doc and table exist and are accessible (and the update is structurally valid). Row inserts/upserts are generally processed within several seconds. Note: this endpoint only works for base tables, not views.
When upserting, if multiple rows match the specified key column(s), they will all be updated with the specified value.

items.docs: Get the status for an asynchronous mutation to know whether or not it has been completed. Each API endpoint that mutates a document will return a request id that you can pass to this endpoint to check the completion status. Status information is not guaranteed to be available for more than one day after the mutation was completed. It is intended to be used shortly after the request was made.

info.name: List the Pack listings accessible to a user.

params.name: packAccessTypes
params.description: Pack access types.

params.name: packIds
params.description: Which Pack IDs to fetch.

params.name: onlyWorkspaceId
params.description: Use only this workspace (not all of a user's workspaces) to check for Packs shared via workspace ACL.

params.name: parentWorkspaceIds
params.description: Filter to only Packs whose parent workspace is one of the given IDs.

params.name: excludePublicPacks
params.description: Only get Packs shared with users/workspaces, not publicly.

params.name: excludeWorkspaceAcls
params.description: Do not include Packs that are only shared with workspaces.

params.name: excludeIndividualAcls
params.description: Do not include Packs that are only shared with the user individually.

params.name: packEntrypoint
params.description: Entrypoint for which this pack call is being made. Used to filter non relevant packs

params.name: certifiedAgentsOnly
params.description: Only include Packs that are certified for agent use. Depending on server configuration, may also include Packs that the user is an admin of.

params.name: packCategories
params.description: Filter Packs by one or more category types.

params.name: sortBy
params.description: Specify a sort order for the returned Pack listings returned.

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Deprecated: use sortBy instead.

params.name: direction
params.description: Direction to sort results in.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in this query.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: An opaque token used to fetch the next page of results.

params.name: installContext
params.description: Type of installation context for which Pack information is being requested.

items.docs: Get listings of public Packs and Packs created by you.

params.description: ID of the target ingestion for checking limit settings

params.description: Release channel for which Pack information is being requested.

info.name: Retrieve the logs of a Pack.

params.name: packId
params.description: ID of a Pack

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in this query.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: An opaque token used to fetch the next page of results.

params.name: docId
params.description: ID of the doc.

params.name: logTypes
params.description: Only return logs of the given types.

params.name: beforeTimestamp
params.description: Only return logs before the given time (non-inclusive).

params.name: afterTimestamp
params.description: Only return logs after the given time (non-inclusive).

params.name: order
params.description: Specifies if the logs will be returned in time desc or asc. Default is desc.

params.name: q
params.description: A search query that follows Lucene syntax.

params.name: requestIds
params.description: Only return logs matching provided request IDs.

items.docs: Retrieve the logs of a Pack for debugging purpose.

info.name: Retrieve the logs of a Ingestion.

params.name: packId
params.description: ID of a Pack

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return in this query.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: An opaque token used to fetch the next page of results.

params.name: tenantId
params.description: ID of the tenant.

params.name: rootIngestionId
params.description: ID of the root ingestion.

params.name: logTypes
params.description: Only return logs of the given types.

params.name: ingestionExecutionId
params.description: ID of the ingestion execution.

params.name: beforeTimestamp
params.description: Only return logs before the given time (non-inclusive).

params.name: afterTimestamp
params.description: Only return logs after the given time (non-inclusive).

params.name: ingestionStatus
params.description: Only fetch logs with the given ingestion status. This only works in combination with the onlyExecutionCompletions parameter.

params.name: onlyExecutionCompletions
params.description: Only fetch logs that represent the completion of a child execution.

params.name: order
params.description: Specifies if the logs will be returned in time desc or asc. Default is desc.

params.name: q
params.description: A search query that follows Lucene syntax.

params.name: requestIds
params.description: Only return logs matching provided request IDs.

items.docs: Retrieve the logs of a Ingestion for debugging purpose.
